content.en:
Rumble!!!!!

One by one, the Silent Extinction Crystals were consumed by Ye Tian, and the Supreme Domain Body in his body was transforming.

At the same time, countless energy treasures were also taken out by Ye Tian, after all, if the Supreme Domain Body was promoted, it would also need a huge amount of energy, and the Silence Treasure only allowed Ye Tian's Supreme Domain Body to quickly refine and break the shackles, but the replenishment of energy could not completely rely on the Silence Treasure.

Besides, he didn't have the luxury of replenishing his energy with the Treasure of Annihilation.

Soon.

Ye Tian's Supreme Domain Body officially broke through, and countless energy treasures were consumed by him.

At this time, Ye Tian's body was transforming, and once the transformation was completed, he had reached the middle stage of the Supreme Domain Ancestor, which was completely a shackle that other Peerless Domain Ancestors could not cross for endless years.

And his foundation far surpasses that of other levelless domain ancestors, he has improved a small realm, and the improvement of his strength is much greater than that of other levelless domain ancestors.

One can imagine how exaggerated the Silent Treasure is for his strength to improve.

About hundreds of thousands of years have passed, and Ye Tiancai finally completed the breakthrough.

"I have finally reached the mid-stage realm of the Peerless Domain Ancestor, and my strength has skyrocketed, and now I am enough to fight with the real half-step Ancestor, and I will not even fall behind!"

Ye Tian has such self-confidence.

However, after his cultivation reached the middle stage of the Peerless Domain Ancestor, it was even more difficult to advance to the late stage of the Peerless Domain Ancestor, and he needed more Silent Destruction Treasures.

Copy the side of the body and slowly collect the Silent Treasure, no need to worry about it.

And he couldn't fully hope for the Treasure of Silence.

In the Dark Forbidden Domain, many precious treasures are not weaker than the effect of the Silent Destruction Treasure, and even more precious than ordinary Silent Destruction Treasures, otherwise the Dark Forbidden Domain would not have given birth to so many ancestors.

For example, if a new Ancestral Realm is born, it is enough to make the ancestors excited.

After all, the ancestral realm has just been born, and many innate things will be born, and the innate things of the ancestral realm can far surpass the innate things of the ordinary world, and even enough to make the ancestors of the non-superior domain crazy, and obtaining the same is enough to make the strength greatly improved.

The Xuanxu Holy Realm was naturally far away from the Ancestral Realm, but now it was far above the Saint Realm.

If it is described by one level, it is the half-step ancestral realm.

--------------------

The years passed.

this day.

A special world was born in the Xuanxu Holy Realm, as soon as this world was born, Ye Tian sealed this world as soon as possible, and no one was allowed to enter, even the invincible domain ancestors of the human race were not allowed to enter this world, and they were not even allowed to know about the situation in this world.

In this regard, the invincible domain ancestors of the human race did not dare to have any opinions.

After all, everything in the human race now was given by Ye Tian, Ye Tian didn't let them know, they didn't dare to have ideas, after all, Ye Tian's strength had reached a height that they couldn't reach, and no one dared to oppose Ye Tian.

At this moment, Ye Tian appeared in this special world.

"This world was actually born with ancestral qi!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He sensed a trace of ancestral aura permeating the void, although it was very faint, but it did exist.

Ancestral Qi only appears in the Ancestral Realm, and for the Domain Ancestors, Ancestral Qi is a higher level of energy, so if you cultivate in the Ancestral Realm, it far exceeds the Saint Realm.

But the Holy Realm can't give birth to ancestral qi.

Now, if the news of the birth of the Ancestral Qi in the Xuanxu Holy Realm is leaked, then trouble will come, and I am afraid that even the Ancestor will come to investigate.

The situation of the Xuanxu Holy Realm couldn't help but be explored by the Ancestor, when one of the thoughts of the Zhan Ancestor came to the Xuanxu Holy Realm, he was almost frightened, for fear that the secrets of the Xuanxu Holy Realm would be exposed, but one of the ancestor's thoughts was not so powerful, and the Zhan Ancestor did not deliberately explore the Xuanxu Holy Realm.

Therefore, the secrets of the Xuanxu Holy Realm were not exposed.

But if an ancestor deliberately explores, even if he can't detect the Creation Mixed Yuan Well, he can also detect the extraordinary and special of the Xuanxu Holy Realm.

"Ancestral Qi was born, the Xuanxu Saint Realm is evolving to the Ancestral Realm, and this world is the beginning of the evolution of the Xuanxu Saint Realm!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He could feel that the ancestral qi of this world was slowly increasing, and it would inevitably become the core of the Xuanxu Saint Realm in the future, and it would also be the core of the Xuanxu Ancestral Realm in the future.

Because of this, he sealed this world, and when he can delay time, he will delay time, and when his strength grows, he will not be afraid of everything.

Even if the Ancestors knew that the Xuanxu Holy Realm would become the Ancestral Realm, so what?

If he had the combat power comparable to that of the Ancestor, then it was very normal to have an Ancestral Realm.

"This world will become the core of the Xuanxu Saint Realm or even the Xuanxu Ancestor Realm in the future, then this place will be called the Heavenly and Human Realm!"

Ye Tian gave this world a name.

In a flash, another 100 million years have passed.

this day.

The celestial and human realms have changed a little, and a small tree has been born.

The birth of this small tree attracted Ye Tian's attention.

"Innate!"

He looked surprised.

Moreover, this is not an innate thing in the Holy Realm, but an innate thing equivalent to the Ancestral Realm, which can also be called an innate ancestor, which is different from ordinary innate things.

At this moment, this small tree was frantically absorbing the ancestral qi of the Heavenly and Human Realms.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's consciousness came into contact with the little tree, deduced it again, and knew part of its information.

Innate Ancestor - Star Forbidden Tree!

According to the results he deduced, the Star Forbidden Fruit born from this Star Forbidden Tree can temper the body, and even has a certain effect of refining the Peerless Domain Body, and for the Peerless Domain Ancestor, its value is precious.

If the Invincible Domain Body is given the Star Forbidden Fruit, one is enough to make the Invincible Domain Ancestor directly ascend from the early stage of the Invincible Domain Ancestor to the Invincible Domain Ancestor Consummation Realm.

Of course.

It takes a long enough time for such a Star Forbidden Tree to grow from its birth to its true growth.

Thereupon.

In the following days, Ye Tian arranged a time acceleration array around the Star Forbidden Tree, and mobilized countless resources to supply it to grow.

Under the condition that Ye Tian cultivated so hard, after 300 million years had passed, the Star Forbidden Tree had grown and turned into a billion-billion-zhang tall Divine Tree, and even 108 Star Forbidden Fruits had grown.

Each star forbidden fruit is as big as a star, exuding an alluring fragrance.
